actionUnits.condition: Pending component/script details. To create a valid manual trigger, --XR-- must have either: (a) a Collider or EventTrigger component, or (b) an attached MonoBehaviour exposing public no-arg methods and/or UnityEvent m_Calls (class inheriting from UnityEngine.Events). The provided scene extract shows only a Transform and Has_Rigidbody=false, so Grab/Transform are not allowed and a Trigger requires confirmation of Collider/EventTrigger or MonoBehaviour with UnityEvent methods. Please supply the MonoBehaviour component block (m_Script fileID/guid, public methods, and UnityEvent m_Calls) for --XR--, or details of its child objects (fileIDs 505562321, 1579370455, 1487704659, 817830252) if interactions are defined there.

LeftHand Controller (fileID: 235308782) has a SphereCollider (isTrigger=1), enabling Trigger interactions. Its MonoBehaviour_0 id=235308790 is configured with script guid=4a8d337e8bc7ac4498e0df29e7b8bd5e (OnButtonPress), binding action '<XRController>{LeftHand}/primaryButton'. The scene meta UnityEvent m_Calls map to ToggleRay methods: OnPress -> ToggleRay.ActivateRay on script fileID 172617727; OnRelease -> ToggleRay.DeactivateRay on script fileID 172617727. To cover these events without physical input, invoke the referenced public no-arg methods directly.
Simulate release phase of OnButtonPress to invoke the configured OnRelease UnityEvent call.

MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 172617727) on LeftHand Ray Controller uses script guid=cf14522d53cc1594991c164e785780dc (class ToggleRay). Serialized fields match the script: forceToggle=0, directInteractor fileID=235308789. This is the exact scene settings of the attached ToggleRay script. No UnityEvent m_Calls are present on this component. Preconditions for ActivateRay: directInteractor has no valid targets (TouchingObject()==false) OR forceToggle is set true in a separate run. Expected behavior: ActivateRay -> SwitchInteractors(true): rayInteractor.enabled=true, directInteractor.enabled=false; then DeactivateRay -> SwitchInteractors(false): rayInteractor.enabled=false, directInteractor.enabled=true.

MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 1287520551) on RightHand Ray Controller is configured with script guid=cf14522d53cc1594991c164e785780dc (class ToggleRay). Serialized fields match the script: forceToggle=0, directInteractor fileID=474225665. This confirms the scene MonoBehaviour settings correspond exactly to the provided ToggleRay script. Preconditions to cover both branches: Ensure directInteractor currently has no valid targets (TouchingObject()==false) so ActivateRay will switch on the ray (isSwitched=true, rayInteractor.enabled=true, directInteractor.enabled=false); then DeactivateRay will revert (isSwitched=false, rayInteractor.enabled=false, directInteractor.enabled=true).
